commands: pnpm exec esbuild --bundle --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=${QC_SERVER_OUT:-dist/server-test}/server.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" apps/server/src/server.ts

pnpm exec esbuild --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=${QC_SERVER_OUT:-dist/server-test}/server.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" apps/server/src/server.ts

options.command: QC_ENV=prod pnpm exec vitest run --config apps/server/vitest.config.ts {args.include}
QC_TIMING=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config apps/server/vitest.config.ts apps/server/spec/dummy-auth.spec.ts {args.include}
QC_TIMING=1 QC_ENV=prod pnpm exec vitest run --config apps/server/vitest.config.ts apps/server/spec/dummy-auth.spec.ts {args.include}
